messages.message: Italy has no interest in conflict with Austria. We suggest we both maintain neutrality in the Tyrolia region and focus on securing our own centers.
France, I propose a mutual non-aggression pact. We could support each other’s movements in the Mediterranean and along the Italian border.

Hi France,
I'm sending a message just to say hi. I'm happy to keep burgundy as a DMZ between us. I also think we should be on the lookout to prevent a strong England in the early game.
Hey Russia! Just a quick heads up that I plan to bounce the Black Sea this turn! If we start things off right I'd love to see a long term alliance between us.

I'm very happy to hear you want a strong RT alliance, I think it's one of those that's easy to play off as a juggernaut but still can sneak behind the rest of the board and do some serious damage to the rest of the board.

I'd love a long term alliance as well and I agree to the bounce in BLA. Do you want a DMZ or a bounce?
I hope we can work together, particularly against England.
Hi Austria! You mind if I ask if you have any plans for splitting the Balkans? I'd love to work with you to take out our northern neighbor.

Hello France! I was wondering what your thoughts are on the current situation. Obviously we'd both do better if we can stay out of each other's hair. If you'd like to help me into Belgium in the fall, I'd be happy to support you to Burgundy and work with you against Germany.
Turkey, I admire your strength in the East. Let us remain on good terms—Italy will not interfere in your affairs, and I hope the same in return.
Greetings Italy, I hope we can work together closely through this game. We have a number of mutual enemies and many opportunities for collaboration.
Greetings Germany, I hope we can work together closely through this game. We have a number of mutual enemies and many opportunities for collaboration.
I appreciate that Italy. Good luck to you this game.

Hi England,
I'm hoping we can work together. I think it's in both of our interests to make sure that France and Russia don't grow strong and early.
Greetings Austria, I hope we can work together closely through this game. We have a number of mutual enemies and many opportunities for collaboration.

Hello Germany! I would love to work together. Perhaps we could work together against France. If you'd be willing to help me into Belgium in the fall, I'd be happy to support you to Burgundy and work with you against France.
Greetings England, I hope we can work together closely through this game. We have a number of mutual enemies and many opportunities for collaboration.
I'd definitely be down to work together! I'd be down to get rid of England real fast, and I'd be fine with a DMZ in Bur if you're willing to promise me Bel.

Hi Russia,
I think you're right. We have a lot to gain by working together in the early game and sharing information.
I'm willing to help you into Belgium. Let's see where France and Russia go this year.
I'd be down to work together! I am interested in Bel, but I'd be willing to compromise. Germany has offered me an alliance to kill you off. You up for splitting the game?
Greetings France, I hope we can work together closely through this game. We have a number of mutual enemies and many opportunities for collaboration.

Hi Italy,
I hope we can work together against Austria in the near future.
I'd be down with a non-aggression pact, that sounds like an excellent plan!
I agree. Any thoughts on a plan?

Hi Austria,
I hope we can work together. Russia is typically not our friend.
I'd be down! We have many mutual enemies and many opportunities for collaboration.
Wonderful. I'll let you know what I hear about you as well.
What have you been hearing from France?

Hi Turkey,
I hope we can work together. We may be able to help each other in the early game.
Not much. Just initial pleasantries. I suspect he will play a standard opening.
Let's do a DMZ in the Black Sea for now, but I want to bounce this turn just to ensure things go smoothly.
I've actually never had a France-england alliance work. I'd be up for it if you were. I think it'd be great to get rid of him early. What moves are you thinking?
France, your support would be most welcome along our shared border. I suggest we both focus on securing our regions first. Perhaps a mutual support in the Mediterranean next season?
Germany, a partnership against Austria sounds intriguing. I have no immediate plans to act in the Tyrolia region myself. Perhaps we could coordinate our moves in the coming seasons?

Hey Germany, I agree that Russia is typically not our friend. Would you want to send a unit or two to Denmark to bounce him out of Sweden? It can slow down his growth to a large extent and even force a disband if he is not successful.
Indeed. It'd be nice to keep in touch as things progress.
That is good news to hear. It is best if we leave our border neutral. If you can send a unit to Pie to pressure France, I think we can help each other out in the long run.
I'm willing to promise you Belgium if we can get England out of the way early.
Absolutely.
Austria, I appreciate your restraint in the Tyrolia region. I suggest we continue to focus on securing our own supply centers without conflict.
That sounds excellent! I look forward to working with you.

Hello France,

You and I are somewhat removed from each other, but I'm sure we'll have more to discuss later in the game. For now, good luck to you.
Absolutely. I'd be happy to work together. I'd imagine you're planning on opening in a standard way.
Hey France, just reaching out to say hi. What are you thinking for the opening year? Let me know if I can help.
Yeah same here
I'm going to keep things neutral this year. But I will look to move to Sweden in 1902.
Hi Russia, what are your plans for the opening year? I'd like to work with you if possible.
Excellent! So I'd like to make MAO into a DMZ, are you okay with that? I can support you into Bel from Pic, or, if you'd like, we can bounce in the channel.
No problem. In that case, would you mind moving to Denmark in the Spring to block Russia's advance?
Let's see what Russia does. I'd rather see an army in Norway than a fleet.
Sounds like a plan to me!
Hey Turkey, that sounds like a plan. I'm happy to split the Balkans with you and keep Russia out. What split were you thinking?
If I do that, then I've made enemies with both England and Russia.

Hello England,

How are things shaping up for you up there in the north? I'd be happy to keep you updated as things develop. Good luck to you this game.
Thank you, good luck to you too.
Great.

Your suggestion is quite reasonable. I will consider moving a unit closer to PIE, though I must remain cautious to preserve Italy’s stability. If we can maintain neutrality along our border while supporting one another in the long term, that would suit us both.
I'm sure we can figure out the specifics when we get there. I just wanted to start the conversation.
Why? England is your biggest threat, not Russia. If you hold in Kiel or go to Denmark, you will have defended your centers and secured your position with 2 units to Russia's 2.
Russia is usually my biggest threat. It will depend on what he does.
I appreciate your enthusiasm for cooperation. Let us continue to focus on securing our own regions first. Perhaps we can explore mutual Mediterranean support when the time is right.
I agree. I hope to see you succeed in moving to Pie so we can help each other out.
Hello Turkey. Same to you. So far everyone seems to be playing it safe. How's it looking for you?
Hey there! I'm thinking about mostly just securing my build, but then I'll be willing to move against either Italy or Germany. You?

How does it depend? All it does is slow Russia down so you don't have to deal with him in the North and can focus on either England or France. What possible way could that be seen as an attack on you?
A standard opening suits Italy well, and I look forward to exploring opportunities for coordination in the future. For now, I intend to remain neutral and focus on securing my own supply centers.
Indeed! I look forward to working together.
I would, however, love to see you open strongly against Austria. Is there any way I could convince you to try that?
Mostly the same. Just want to grab some Sc's and make sure that Russia doesn't decide to come down on me.
I admire your strength and would be delighted to maintain peaceful relations. Let us keep the Eastern Mediterranean stable, as it benefits us both.
A move toward PIE sounds promising, and I appreciate your support. Let us ensure our mutual stability in Tyrolia by focusing on securing our own centers first.
Agreed—let us both focus on securing our regions for now. Perhaps we can coordinate Mediterranean support in the fall.
Yeah, that's the plan.
Agreed.
Makes sense. Good luck!
I am currently moving to Pic with my fleet and to MAO with my army.
Great. I'll keep my options open too.

Just about the same, safe so far. I'm still trying to talk my way into getting Black Sea. I've asked Italy if they'd consider opening against Austria, but haven't heard back yet.

You get a good read on Russia yet?
I appreciate your bold suggestion, but I prefer to maintain stability in the region for now. Perhaps a stronger move against Austria will come at the right moment.
We'll see. He might open north.
Sounds good!
I haven't heard back from him yet.
Agreed, stability in the Eastern Mediterranean benefits both of us. I look forward to the right moment for bold moves together.
I would assume so.
I'm not really concerned about Russia and I can be very neutral this year.
Okay great. Could you move to Burgundy from Paris though? It gives us a chance to really go at Germany and he could slip to Ruhr.
I assume we're both playing nice with England for the time being?
Keeping options open is wise, Germany. Perhaps a future alliance will prove mutually beneficial—until then, I remain neutral and watchful.
Yup! I told him I'd support him into Bel.
Very fair, and I will likely be in the same position.
Sounds good, France. Let us remain focused on our own growth for now—Italy values your cooperation and will not forget it.
Interesting.
Ahh, good point! I can do that.
That makes sense.
I told him I'd do that too. We both want him to think he has the support of at least one of us.
Awesome
Absolutely.
Indeed, France too values Italian cooperation.
Okay. Let's see how things play out.
I appreciate your continued restraint, Austria. Let us keep Tyrolia peaceful while we each consolidate our own positions.
Indeed, Turkey, mutual restraint is wise for now. Should circumstances shift in the East, I trust we shall find a moment to act in our shared interest.
France, I am pleased we agree. Let us keep the door open for Mediterranean cooperation when the time feels right. Until then, may our borders remain peaceful.
Have you heard anything?
Agreed.
Germany, I look forward to future opportunities. For now, let us both focus on securing our positions—Italy remains neutral, but always attentive.
Agreed
I'll open very standard and see where it goes. Obviously I'll be going for RUM. Do you want to bounce in Galicia?
Absolutely!
Great.
Yup. That works for me.
Indeed. I look forward to working with you.
Me too.
Any chance I could get your support into Denmark in the fall?
Austria, your restraint is appreciated. Let us continue to preserve peace along our borders while we both grow stronger.
I agree. We are in the weakest positions on the board so there is no point in fighting each other. It only hurts us both.
Yeah, they seem amicable.
France, I am heartened by your enthusiasm. Let us keep the door open for Mediterranean cooperation when the time feels right. Until then, may our borders remain peaceful.
But you said you wanted to keep things neutral. Neutral means staying put in your starting position?
Sorry for that duplicate message, something happened on my end
Germany, I look forward to future opportunities. For now, let us both focus on securing our positions—Italy remains neutral, but always attentive.
Austria, your restraint is appreciated. Let us continue to preserve peace along our borders while we both grow stronger.
Not sure what I mean. My armies aren't going anywhere this year.
Sorry. Bad refresh.
Okay cool
Turkey, I admire your boldness, but patience is a virtue. When the moment arises, I trust we shall act in our mutual interest.

I appreciate your wisdom, Austria. Indeed, it is unwise for us to weaken ourselves through conflict when stronger powers press upon us. Let us remain firm in our neutrality, and perhaps one day we may even find cause to act together.
I would rather DMZ it if that's alright with you. Is that okay with you?

No worries at all about the duplicate—these things happen. I remain as open to cooperation as ever. Let us keep our lines of communication clear, and perhaps soon we'll find a way to support each other's ambitions.

No harm done with the refresh mishap. I, too, value clear communication. Germany, I see you as a potential ally in the future—let us both focus on consolidation and remain watchful of the other players.
No worries. I haven't heard anything of use to you.
Patience is indeed wise, Turkey. I admire your strength in the East, and I remain ready to support your interests in the Mediterranean when the moment proves right for both of us.
Glad to hear it! I'll let you know what else I hear.
I completely agree. If you need my help with anything or want any advice, I'm happy to help. Just let me know.
Well I don't want you to move to Bohemia or Tyrolia. I hope that we can keep the middle of the map neutral. Let me know if there is anything I can do for you.
Glad to hear it! I'll let you know when I decide to make a move.
Also, I believe France is planning on moving to Pie in the Spring. Perhaps you could bounce him there.
Sounds good. I'm sure you understand that I can't allow a 3 unit Russia next to my border.

Your insight regarding France’s potential move to PIE is most valuable. Should France attempt it, I would be honored to assist you in countering it—though for now, I remain focused on securing Italy’s own stability.
Agreed! I value your openness and kindness.
I completely understand.
That is fine, I just thought I'd give you a heads up.
Same. I'll let you know about Germany if I hear anything
How are things looking Italy?
Hello England. We don't really have any reason to talk right now, but I just want to open up communication between us. Let me know if you need anything.
Hello Austria. I appreciate that. How's it going in the East?
Well Russia was trying to get me to go with the infamous Key Lepanto, so that isn't working out. How's the West looking?
So far so good. We'll see what happens after spring though.
Are you still looking to get Black Sea?
Best of luck.
I would be happy to do so if you don't move an army to NWY.
Thanks! I think so, Russia seems more willing to play ball than I'd hoped. I'm still waiting to hear back from Austria, but they're amicable as well.
I take it that means you've chosen to move in a different direction?
Okay cool.
That's the plan.
Your patience is wise, Turkey. I look forward to the day our paths align in the East. Until then, may we both grow stronger and keep the region watchful.
I appreciate your openness to cooperation. Let us continue to maintain peace along our borders, and perhaps explore Mediterranean opportunities soon.
Germany, I remain attentive to future opportunities. For now, I suggest we consolidate our positions and keep our options open.
Can you support me into Bel from Pic?
Are you working with Russia, or is that fleet in the Black Sea going to be problematic?
Are you going for Germany or Austria?
Absolutely. I'll support you into Bel. Are you thinking of going to Irish Sea?

My focus remains on securing Italy’s southern flank and ensuring peace along our borders. I have no interest in entanglements with Germany or Austria—at least not yet. Let us keep our sights on mutual Mediterranean interests.
What are your plans for your fleet?
What are your plans for your Black Sea fleet?
Italy's getting a little close there. Did you know they were planning that?
I haven't decided yet. If I were you, I'd probably go for Ska. I have a feeling England is gonna be trying to bounce me in Bel or protect Lon.
I'm going to try to sneak into NWY, though it will likely be a bounce. I think you should probably cover BRE.
I assume you'll be letting me into SWE?
Not sure yet. The bounce would have been better, but I tried to tell Russia I'd move there so we could establish trust.
So I see you didn't have much of an issue with France.
Are you still thinking about moving on Austria?
Excellent. You have my support.
Looks like we have a conflict with England and France. How do you want to play it?
I admire your strength in the Balkans and your strategic patience. Should your path lead eastward, I hope our interests may align one day. Until then, let us remain neutral and watchful.
The East will call us both soon enough, Turkey. For now, let us ensure our own strength and watch others exhaust themselves in their wars. I remain your most courteous neighbor.

I remain focused on securing my southern flank and exploring opportunities in the Mediterranean. Germany and Austria are distant concerns for now. Let us maintain peace between us and watch others fight their wars.
I heard that he was moving there, but I did not know that he was going to support his move. If you think it is an issue, let me know.
Also, it looks like you and England have a little conflict of interest. Did you know he was planning on going to the Channel?
I'll consider it.
Sounds good to me!
No, I did not!
Makes sense. Good luck!
I have no idea. England hasn't communicated much. I'm just doing my best to keep my options open and see what happens.
Agreed, best of luck to you as well.
What are your plans for your fleet in the channel?
I take it Germany is our target then?
Yep. I'm just taking Denmark.
No problem. I think that I'm going to have to deal with Russia, so I will have to defend against Italy.

Italy’s focus remains on the south and the Mediterranean. Austria poses little immediate threat to me, and I see no reason to entangle ourselves in northern conflicts. Let us remain neutral and watchful.
Sorry about that. I should have let you know ahead of time. I'm just going to use it to try to get Belgium. I'll try to land an army over there if possible.
Indeed.
That's my preference, yes.
Well Russia is in trouble with you in the Baltic Sea, so if you feel you can spare a unit to take Warsaw, that would help. But it is up to you.
Actually, it might be better if you use Picardy to support me to Belgium and we can leave the channel dmz
Your strength in the Balkans is admirable, and I see no reason for us to clash. Let us remain neutral and allow others to exhaust themselves in their rivalries.

Italy’s neutrality remains steadfast, and I see no reason for tension between us. Let us both focus on strengthening our own positions. If your ambitions ever turn eastward, you will find me a willing—if not yet eager—partner.
Sounds good.
Alright. Let me know if there's anything I can do to help you out.
Great. So I'll land the army in Norway. How are things going for you in the south?
Sounds good. Best of luck to you.
So are you planning on moving on Rumania or Greece?
I'm glad to hear. Best of luck to you.
I think you're okay for now.
It's an option. Not certain yet.
Well done with Italy.
Awesome, thanks for the heads up!
Do you have any idea where you are going to be moving this season? I'm still deciding what to do with my units.
I was thinking I'd go for Greece, if that's all right with you.
Thanks. France seemed to be under the impression that you guys were working together, but it looks like that isn't the case.
Alright, not great though.
That's fine. Would you be willing to support me to Rum after this year?
Any decision on whether or not you will be going for Warsaw?
Glad to hear it.
I will not be going for Warsaw.
Probably. I'm still worried about Russia taking the Black Sea, but we'll see.
Do you need support into Belgium?
Peace along our borders remains my highest priority. I appreciate your agreement and hope we can explore Mediterranean cooperation soon. Let others fight their wars while we grow quietly.
Currently, I am going to be focused on getting builds. I'd be down to collaborate in the Mediterranean soon.
Sounds good. Good luck up there.
Sounds good to me. Best of luck.
Sounds good. Best of luck to you!
We are. I'm trying to land an army.
Can we do that?
Thanks, you too!
I would suggest supporting Bulgaria from Con. I can get Germany to bounce Russia in Sweden so he will only get one build.
Fair. Do you know if Russia is going to support themselves to Rum?
Yeah, I can support you.
Has Germany said anything to you? He has been very vague in what he is doing, but it seems as if he has a grudge against Russia.
From where are you moving into Bel?
Yorkshire. Thank you
Okay, sounds good. Best of luck up there.
Thanks.
That would be appreciated
I haven't heard from him in awhile, but I imagine he will.
I haven't heard anything from him about Russia, sorry!
Thanks you too
Still good with the plan in Germany?
I'll support Yorkshire to Belgium?
Yes.
Cool
No problem. I'll let you know if he says anything else.
Just out of curiosity, do you plan on bouncing Russia in Sweden?
Okay cool.
Awesome
Italy has no interest in entanglements with Austria—at least not yet. Let others weaken themselves first. Should the balance shift, I remain open to future opportunities.
Not sure. We'll see how this turn goes.
How are things between you and Italy?
We are good. I've just been focused on the east.
Are you planning on going for Tunis this season?
So, what are your plans from here?
I am probably going to take Greece.
He's been asking me for information about you.
Any idea what France is doing with MAO?
Hey! What are your plans this turn?
Hey Germany! Do you have any plans to bounce Russia out of Sweden?

I'm moving UKR-RUM.

Do you want to try for SER?
I don't think I will.
Okay, thanks.
And what have you told him?
Alright, sounds good. I'll be trying for RUM.
I assume he's moving to Portugal
Austria and I have agreed to bounce Greece, which should keep Austria out of Ser.
Okay. Best of luck.
He is going for Rumania. I'll support you there.
He tells me he's going for GRE, you should bounce him.
Will do!
You too.
Awesome.
The East will come to us both in time, Turkey. For now, let us ensure our own strength and watch others exhaust themselves in their rivalries. I remain your courteous neighbor.
Thanks, but I'm worried about Black Sea so I'm going to bounce Greece. I'd still appreciate the support next turn though!
Not much. Just that he's staying neutral.
And I you!
Okay.
Okay. You sure you don't want the support?
You know if Germany is planning to bounce Sweden?
I think so. He has been very hesitant to let me have Belgium.
How are you with Russia?
How are things going with you?
I do want it. Let's get you there.
Better than expected, for now.

Tunis is certainly intriguing, but I must remain cautious. For now, I prefer to focus on securing my southern flank. Perhaps one day our paths may align in the West. Until then, let us remain neutral and watchful.
Not bad so far.
Yeah me too.
What are your plans for Galicia?
Are you planning to bounce Gal again?
I understand. I've just been trying to figure out how the south is playing out.
Galicia is going to be used to support my move to Rum.
Is that okay with you?
Indeed, best of luck to you as well. May your Mediterranean ambitions bear fruit, and perhaps we can find common ground in the future.
And to you, Turkey. The East will call us both soon enough, but for now, let us grow stronger and let others weaken themselves in their rivalries.
I haven't decided yet.
Let me know. I might be able to offer support to Rum next turn if you bounce Austria out of Galicia again.
Good luck to you too!
Have you heard anything from France?
Yeah, that's fine.
Will do.
Okay

The south is indeed a delicate dance of alliances and ambitions. I remain focused on securing my own flank while watching how others maneuver. Let us remain watchful together—perhaps one day our paths will converge in the East.
Thank you, Turkey. The East will call us both soon enough, and I remain your most courteous neighbor. For now, let us grow stronger and let others weaken themselves in their rivalries.
France’s ambitions in the Mediterranean are as unclear as ever. I remain focused on securing Italy’s southern interests and maintaining peace along my borders. Best of luck with your own strategies.
Indeed, and I hope we can find that common ground in the near future.

France’s moves are indeed intriguing, though their true intentions remain veiled. I remain focused on securing my southern flank and maintaining peace along my borders. Should their ambitions grow too bold, I trust our mutual interest in stability will guide us both.

Thank you for your kind words. I remain focused on securing Italy’s southern interests and maintaining peace between us. The Mediterranean holds many opportunities, and I hope our paths may align in the near future.
Yeah, I've gotten that one from you about 4 times now.
Thank you, Turkey. The East will come to us both in time. For now, let us grow stronger and ensure our own positions remain secure while others weaken themselves in their rivalries.
Okay great.
That would be excellent.
I appreciate the sentiment though.
Hey, any interest in working together against Austria?
How are things looking for you this turn?

Your patience and strength in the Balkans are admirable. I see no reason for us to clash, and I remain focused on securing my own southern flank. Should your ambitions ever turn eastward, you will find me a willing—if not yet eager—partner.

That would be excellent indeed—though I must confess my focus remains firmly on securing Italy’s southern interests. I trust your Mediterranean ambitions will remain peaceful, and perhaps we shall find common cause in the future.
You are most kind. The East will call us both soon enough, Turkey. Until then, let us grow stronger and ensure others weaken themselves in their rivalries.

Austria is a formidable power, but Italy’s interests lie closer to home—for now. I would rather observe the shifting tides before committing to any alliance. Perhaps our paths will cross further south in due time.

Indeed, peace between us is a welcome relief. I remain focused on securing my southern flank, and should your Mediterranean ambitions ever require a partner, I would be honored to consider cooperation. Let us remain watchful together.
Of course. I will keep an eye out.
Looks like Italy's looking east, so you might be able to get into GRE.
How are things looking for you?
Things are looking good. How are things for you?
Kind words are always appreciated, Turkey. While our paths may not converge immediately, I remain ever-courteous and watchful of the East. Let us grow stronger while others weaken themselves.
Yeah, maybe. We'll see what happens.
Sounds good.
I'm glad to see you moving against Austria, hopefully we can keep him from getting any builds.

Austria is certainly formidable, but Italy’s interests lie closer to home—for now. I would rather observe the shifting tides before committing to any alliance. Perhaps our paths may converge further south in due time.

Your vigilance is wise, Turkey. Austria may be strong in the Balkans, but his ambitions will surely stretch thin before long. For now, let us both grow quietly and ensure our own strength. The East will call us both soon enough.
Sounds good!
I'm not really sure what to make of how things are going at the moment. What about you?
Sounds good.
Not bad. I'm still deciding what I'm doing.
Sounds good!
Can I ask where Warsaw is headed?
No worries. Let me know if you change your mind.
Makes sense. Good luck deciding!
I'm still deciding. I wanted to have a unit there to defend against a potential A/I attack.
Thanks!
Are you okay with this?
Yes, that's fine.
Wonderful.
You're welcome!
Hope you'll let me know if anything changes.
Just don't do anything to piss me off.
So what's your plan after this year? I can help you out with Germany.
I'm thinking about moving down to the Mediterranean and seeing how things shake out in the East. I could definitely help out with Germany, but I'd want Munich. You?

Okay cool. I'd prefer to go east as well. It's a lot more difficult for England to attack France than the other way around so you can feel safe moving south. I'd be happy to take Holland, Kiel, and Berlin and would be happy to support you to Munich.
How does that sound?
That sounds great!
Awesome. What's the plan for this year?
I'm gonna build an army in Paris and try to move to Bur
Okay. I'll try to get an army into Holland in the fall.

AUSTRIA: A SER S F ALB - GRE
RUSSIA: F SEV S A UKR - RUM

messages.message: You should've went for Norway.

Russia, your words are noted. I admire your patience and strength in the north. Should Austria’s ambitions lead him eastward, I trust our paths may converge in due time. Until then, let us remain watchful.
No worries, my friend. Best of luck to you.
I thought he would have support himself into BEL and I wanted to avoid him getting two builds.
Well it looks like he gave up the Black Sea.
How do you want to play it now?

I remain committed to peace along our shared borders and to securing Italy’s southern interests. Should your Mediterranean ambitions grow, I hope we can find common cause. For now, let others fight their wars while we grow quietly.
Yeah, I don't understand why he didn't bounce me again. I guess he wants to get rid of that fleet?
He did support himself into Belgium. I was hoping to prevent that by bouncing in NTH.
Thought we were going to bounce.
Probably. You can probably take it this year. I'm going to take Galicia and we can work together to take Warsaw.

Your patience and strength are admirable, Austria. I see no reason for tension between us, and I remain focused on securing my own southern flank. Should your ambitions ever turn eastward, you will find me a willing—if not yet eager—partner.
I got word from France that you were working with him against me. I guess it didn't pan out like that though. I'd be happy to work with you against France if you'd like.
I was too optimistic and thought he would use NWG to convoy.
Looks like we're in good position.
Interesting. I've never seen a Germany give up Denmark like that. I guess we're all going to have to work together against him.
What do you want to do about BLA this turn?
I haven't seen that before, either. I guess he was hoping you wouldn't go there?
Oh well. I'll still be looking to get my fleet into the North Sea if you can get your fleet into Norway.
How do you want to split up the Scs?
Yeah, he can't defend both Hol and Den.

Absolutely! Let's leave Pie, Gulf of Lyon, Western Med and North Africa as a DMZ. I'm planning on moving North for the most part, but we should still keep in contact about our goals. I hope that we can cooperate soon.
Looks that way. I'm going to move to Con and then to Aegean, so I won't be in Black Sea for awhile.
Well that was redundant.
We should try to get you into Galicia this turn, and I should be able to get my army into Serbia.
That's the plan.
I guess so. I'm going to move on Holland so he won't be able to hold Denmark.
I'll build a fleet in London so you don't get worried. I'm going to use it to take North Sea. I'd appreciate it if you didn't build one in Brest.
Understood.
I was thinking you could take Rumania and Warsaw, and I'll take Greece and Sevastopol.
That sounds good. Are you thinking two armies for me?
Sounds good though.

Russia, your confidence is wise—patience is a virtue we both share. Should Austria grow too bold in the south, or Germany press eastward, I trust our paths will align in mutual interest. For now, let us remain quiet observers, each in our own sphere.
Absolutely, my friend.
Yeah, I would prefer you build in Warsaw. You'll probably want to see where Germany builds first though.
Okay. That's fine.
Thanks
I guess you changed your mind?

A DMZ sounds most agreeable, my friend. Let us both grow quietly, undisturbed by unnecessary conflict. I admire your northern ambitions, and should they ever draw the attention of Germany or Austria, I would be honored to speak with you again about cooperation.
And with England too?
